models.label: Qwen 3.5 2B (recommended default, 8GB+)
models.json_reliability_note: Excellent tool-use and structured JSON output. Strong agent benchmark (TAU2: 48.8).
models.description: Best 2B model for structured resume analysis. 2.7GB leaves plenty of RAM for the embedding model.
models.best_for: 8GB RAM default — pairs with qwen3-embedding:0.6b (3.3GB total). 256K context.

models.label: Qwen 3.5 4B (10GB+ recommended default)
models.json_reliability_note: Dominant benchmark winner at 4B class. TAU2 79.9 vs gemma4:e4b 42.2 (+38pts).
models.description: Best 4B model overall: dominates structured task benchmarks. Fits 10GB+ with embed model.
models.best_for: 10GB RAM — pairs with snowflake-arctic-embed2 or qwen3-embedding:0.6b (4.0-4.6GB total).

models.label: Qwen 3.5 9B (16GB quality tier)
models.json_reliability_note: Strong all-rounder; default 'qwen3.5:latest' tag resolves to this size.
models.description: Quality tier for 16GB machines. Significantly stronger than 4B for edge-case resumes.

models.label: Gemma 4 E2B (multilingual / audio, 10GB+)
models.json_reliability_note: Good multilingual output; lower TAU2 agent score than qwen3.5:2b. 7.2GB model — needs 10GB+ to co-load with an embedding model.
models.description: Google's edge model. Best for audio+vision capabilities. 7.2GB runtime size requires 10GB+ RAM to safely pair with an embedding model.
models.best_for: 10GB+ RAM when you specifically want Google's multimodal model. For 8GB use qwen3.5:2b (2.7GB) instead.

models.label: Nemotron 3 Nano 4B (NVIDIA, thinking+tools)
models.json_reliability_note: NVIDIA hybrid MoE with thinking and tools. Alternative to qwen3.5:2b.
models.description: NVIDIA's efficient MoE model with configurable thinking mode. 3.5B active params.
models.best_for: Alternative 8GB option. 2.8GB pairs safely with any embedding model.

models.label: Gemma 4 26B MoE (24GB workstation)
models.json_reliability_note: Google MoE flagship. 3.8B active params at runtime. Audio + vision.
models.description: 26B MoE with 3.8B active params. Strong structured task results at frontier scale.

models.label: Gemma 4 31B Dense (32GB best quality)
models.json_reliability_note: Arena AI #3 open model. Best assistant quality at 31B dense.
models.description: Google's flagship dense model. Highest chat quality and reasoning at this tier.

models.label: LFM2 24B-A2B (16GB, ultra-fast MoE)
models.json_reliability_note: Liquid AI hybrid: 2B active params, 112 tok/s on CPU. Tools supported.
models.description: Extremely efficient MoE. 24B total / 2B active. Fastest inference on CPU at this quality level.
models.best_for: 16GB with speed priority. Note: 32K context (shorter than other models).

models.label: Llama 3.2 3B (widely installed fallback)
models.json_reliability_note: Good tools support. Smaller JSON outputs may need retries on complex prompts.
models.description: Meta's small multilingual model. Very widely installed — good fallback.
models.best_for: Fallback when qwen3.5:2b is unavailable. Already installed on most machines.

models.label: Phi-4 Mini (Microsoft, MIT license)
models.json_reliability_note: MIT license. Good reasoning density. Lower than qwen3.5 on agent benchmarks.
models.description: Microsoft's compact model with MIT license. Reasoning-focused.
models.best_for: MIT-licensed deployments, math reasoning. Use qwen3.5:2b for higher structured output quality.

embed_models.label: Qwen3 Embedding 0.6B (8GB default)
embed_models.description: 639MB, 32K context window. Pairs perfectly with qwen3.5:2b for 3.3GB total on 8GB machines.
embed_models.best_for: Default embedding model for all RAM tiers. Full resume + JD text fits in one call.

embed_models.label: EmbeddingGemma 300M (Gemma family, 2K ctx)
embed_models.description: Google's 300M QAT embedding model. Best <500M on MTEB. NOTE: 2K context may truncate long resumes.
embed_models.best_for: Gemma family pairing (gemma4:e2b). Slightly smaller than qwen3-embedding:0.6b but shorter context.

embed_models.label: Snowflake Arctic Embed 2 (8K context, highest BEIR)
embed_models.description: 568M params, Apache 2.0. Highest BEIR score among sub-1GB models. Good 8K context for long resumes.
embed_models.best_for: 10GB+ tier. Best retrieval quality at ~1GB size.

embed_models.label: Qwen3 Embedding 4B (16GB, MTEB top-tier)
embed_models.description: 2.5GB, 40K context. Best quality below 8B. MTEB score 70.58 (same as 8B).

embed_models.label: Qwen3 Embedding 8B (24GB+ maximum quality)
embed_models.description: 4.7GB, 40K context. #1 MTEB multilingual leaderboard. Maximum quality.
embed_models.best_for: 24GB+ only — pairs with gemma4:26b or qwen3.5:27b.
